series.title: Liliane Susewind
series.curator_notes:
The primary artist contains only the movie tie-in.
            The full book series is available as audiobook readings (Ungekürzte/Gekürzte Lesungen) under author Tanya Stewner (not a variant artist but the author).
            Standard Hörspiel episodes with voice actors do not appear to be on Spotify under this series name. Audiobook versions are 15-30+ hour narrated books (gekürzt/ungekürzt), not the 20-60 min radio play format.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
